{
  "claims": [
    "The Real Time Crime Center (RTCC) is designed to enhance public safety through the integration of advanced technology.",
    "The RTCC enables officers, crime analysts, and dispatchers to gather and share critical information in real time.",
    "The integration of technology in the RTCC aims to help apprehend offenders, prevent crime, and improve officer safety.",
    "Many law enforcement agencies across the nation have adopted or are in the process of implementing Real Time Crime Centers.",
    "The U.S. Department of Justice Office of Justice Programs states that RTCCs enable law enforcement to leverage a range of technologies for more efficient and effective policing.",
    "The RTCC consolidates data from various technologies into a unified platform."
  ]
}
